detail.description: Bo Naylor doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II. Rhys Hoskins scores. Daniel Schneemann scores.

Bo Naylor singles on a ground ball to second baseman Nick Loftin.

pitches.typeDescription: Guardians challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Brayan Rocchio caught stealing 2nd base, catcher Carter Jensen to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.

detail.description: Bo Naylor homers (2) on a fly ball to right field. Travis Bazzana scores. Brayan Rocchio scores.

pitches.typeDescription: Travis Bazzana steals (4) 3rd base. Brayan Rocchio steals (4) 2nd base.
